i1403.1: 1 The New Rural Social Pension has not been introduced in my local area.
i1403.3: 3 I am not satisfied with the benefits because it isnt cost-effective.
i1403.4: 4 The benefits are poor, and mean nothing to my life.
i1403.5: 5 Application and payment arrangements make it inconvenient to participate.
i1403.6: 6 The mechanism for making contributions is not justifiable.
i1403.7: 7 I do not have a local Hukou.
i1403.8: 8 I am already covered by other social pension insurance.

curation_note: CSV/Parquet 保留原始编码值；变量标签和值标签在 metadata JSON 中。
parquet_note: Parquet 要求单列类型稳定；含 Stata 特殊缺失码的 object 列会转成字符串，原始缺失码定义仍记录在 missing_user_values / value_labels 中。
